{{Quote|Senator Eekway. Another hoi-broth?|Amidala offers Eekway another Hoi-broth|<ref name="rots" />}}
'''Hoi-broth''' was an [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] soup and beverage which was considered a delicacy. [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] was allergic to the soup and once reacted badly to drinking it on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ando/Legends|Ando]]. It was served by [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]] at her [[Naboo Queen (restaurant)|apartment]] during a meeting of the [[Delegation of 2000]] held there, and was also served at [[Dex's Diner/Legends|Dex's Diner]].

==Description==
Considered both a soup<ref name="DaD" /> and a beverage,<ref name="CSWE" /> Hoi-broth's ingredients included boiled [[Seaweed/Legends|seaweed]] and [[Oxygen/Legends|oxidized]] [[Spice/Legends|spices]]. The broth could be served in a tube and had a distinctive smell which would remain even after the broth had been consumed.<ref name="rots" />

==History==
Hoi-broth was considered a delicacy during the reign of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].<ref name="CSWE" /> The [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] was allergic to Hoi-broth, and during a diplomatic mission to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ando/Legends|Ando]] had a severe reaction to drinking it, nearly causing a diplomatic incident as several powerful leaders hurled accusations and chairs until Anakin scolded the Jedi master for hiding his food allergy due since everyone thought the Malakite Poisoners were targeting the banquet. Despite hating the broth herself. [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]] served it at one of the meetings held in her [[Naboo Queen (restaurant)|apartment]] for the [[Delegation of 2000]], a group of senators opposed to [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] use of emergency powers during the war. At the meeting Amidala's [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] served the broth on a tray,<ref name="rots" /> and [[Pantoran/Legends|Pantoran]]<ref name="db">{{DB|character|chieekway|Eekway, Chi}}</ref> senator [[Chi Eekway Papanoida/Legends|Chi Eekway Papanoida]] drank some, although she refused a second tube of it. Amidala's husband, [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], later realized she had held the meeting after he smelt Hoi-broth and knew she would not have consumed it herself.<ref name="rots" /> The broth was also served at the [[Besalisk/Legends|Besalisk]] [[Chef/Legends|chef]] [[Dexter Jettster/Legends|Dexter Jettster's]] [[Dex's Diner/Legends|diner]] on the planet [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], where it was sold as the "Daily soup" on [[Benduday/Legends|Benduday]] for 2.1 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]].<ref name="DaD" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Hoi-broth.png|thumb|Hoi-broth in ''Tiny Death Star'']]
Hoi-broth first appeared in the novelization of [[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith (novelization)|''Star Wars Episode III: Revenge of the Sith'']] which was written by [[Matthew Stover]] and released in [[2005]]. It appears in a scene not included in the [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|film]] version of ''Revenge of the Sith''. The broth also received an entry in the [[2009]] ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' and was then mentioned later that year in "[[Dining at Dex's]]" an article published on the [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]] section of [[StarWars.com]] and written by [[Gregory Walker]]. The dish was also featured and pictured in the non-[[canon]] game ''[[Star Wars: Tiny Death Star]]'' as an item that could be ordered at the Mon Cala Seafood level.
